source_anchors.name: OpenAI HealthBench project page

source_anchors.name: BRIDGE GitHub repository
source_anchors.supports: 87 real world clinical text tasks, 9 languages, more than one million samples, specialty and care stage coverage, open access and regulated access boundary

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Does each row explain the unsafe response pattern rather than only mark a model answer as wrong
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Failure Atlas taxonomy row risk mechanism note reviewer question

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Can every public medical or policy claim be traced to a source without implying clinical advice
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: SourceCheckup claim row source URL support state uncertainty state

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Is clinician review a visible gate for interpretation rather than a decoration after scoring
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Reviewer role table adjudication question disagreement capture

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Does the public output avoid ranking models when the evidence only supports safety inspection
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: No ranking wording card blocked wording log release note boundary

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Is Turkish language scope treated as a coverage question rather than a translated afterthought
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Turkish specialty spread row language boundary note medical terminology review

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Are specialties document types and care stages recorded before broad medical AI claims are made
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Specialty spread dashboard document type label care stage label

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Are label provenance leakage missingness and regulated data boundaries visible
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Label audit row data quality card leakage statement regulated access note

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Does the artifact avoid copying benchmark examples or ground truth into public text
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Example protection statement source summary public safe paraphrase

compatibility_lanes.public_artifact_question: Can a reader distinguish a public companion note from an official benchmark contribution or submission
compatibility_lanes.evidence_to_prepare: Boundary paragraph issue body release note audit record
